task_description: Fix manual adjustment premium fetch/input flow so all premium-like rows, including PREMI TIKET, PREMI ANGKUT/TABUR PUPUK, and KOREKSI PANEN/POTONGAN_KOTOR, are classified from extend_db_ptrj payroll_manual_adjustments and remarks sync/match tokens. Only rows whose remarks say sync:MISS/MISSING/NOT_FOUND or match:MISMATCH/DIFF/PARTIAL should be sent to Plantware input; synced/matched rows must be skipped.
